purpose: Implementation-facing MCP specification for the first Launchpad Lint release.

sources.notes: Canonical public tool contract for V1.

content.body: Build a hosted HTTPS MCP product with exactly two public tools in V1: `audit_launch_readiness` and `draft_launch_package`.
Accept a candidate server package and return launch blockers, strengths, warnings, and suggested fixes.
Accept validated product inputs and return a short description, long description, example prompts, explicit limits, and pricing questions.
The product must support clean tool discovery, public HTTPS deployment, and marketplace-facing documentation that matches actual behavior.

promotion.notes: First implementation-facing spec for Launchpad Lint.
